answers: Research company, practice questions, dress well, be confident, ask questions, follow up.
Interview prep: research the company thoroughly, practice STAR-format answers, arrive early, dress professionally, and always send a thank-you email after.
Key interview tips: know the job description inside out, prepare answers for 'tell me about yourself' and common HR questions, and ask thoughtful questions at the end.
Be genuine, be prepared. Research the company, rehearse your stories, listen carefully to questions, and follow up with a thank-you note.
